## CustomAnnotationTagDocumentation interface

Documentation text for an extension annotation's TSDoc authoring tag.

These strings are consumed by editor integrations for completion details and hover text. They do not affect annotation parsing, inheritance, or schema emission.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface CustomAnnotationTagDocumentation
```
